data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement regarding discount types.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of specific discount types, including code-based and automatic pricing. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm the existence or functionality of these discount types. The linked use case mentions these needs but lacks the necessary details to assert their implementation, leading to an inconclusive status.
gaps: No evidence of discount types: percentage, fixed amount, free service.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
